raw_response:
```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"

normalized_counts = {str(k).replace(" ", ""): v for k, v in counts.items()}
assert len(normalized_counts) == expected_states

expected_prob = 1.0 / expected_states
tolerance = max(0.05, 4.0 / (shots ** 0.5))

for i in range(expected_states):
    bitstring = format(i, "0{}b".format(num_input_qubits))
    assert bitstring in normalized_counts
    observed = normalized_counts[bitstring]
    prob = observed / shots if observed > 1 else observed
    assert abs(prob - expected_prob) <= tolerance
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"
assert len(counts) == expected_states

expected = shots / expected_states
tolerance = max(1, 0.2 * expected)

for i in range(expected_states):
    bitstring = format(i, f"0{num_input_qubits}b")
    assert bitstring in counts, f"Missing basis state: {bitstring}"
    assert abs(counts[bitstring] - expected) <= tolerance, (
        f"State {bitstring} count {counts[bitstring]} not close to uniform expectation {expected}"
    )

assert sum(counts.values()) == shots
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits
expected_prob = 1.0 / expected_states

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"
assert set(counts.keys()) == {format(i, f"0{num_input_qubits}b") for i in range(expected_states)}

tolerance = 0.15
for bitstring in [format(i, f"0{num_input_qubits}b") for i in range(expected_states)]:
    assert abs(counts[bitstring] - expected_prob) <= tolerance, (bitstring, counts[bitstring], expected_prob)
assert abs(sum(counts.values()) - 1.0) <= 1e-9
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits
expected_prob = 1.0 / expected_states

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"
assert len(counts) == expected_states

total = sum(counts.values())
tolerance = max(0.05, 5.0 / (shots ** 0.5))

for i in range(expected_states):
    bitstring = format(i, f"0{num_input_qubits}b")
    assert bitstring in counts, f"Missing basis state {bitstring}"
    observed_prob = counts[bitstring] / total
    assert abs(observed_prob - expected_prob) <= tolerance, (
        f"State {bitstring} has probability {observed_prob}, expected about {expected_prob}"
    )
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"

total_counts = sum(counts.values())
assert total_counts == shots

normalized_counts = {}
for bitstring, value in counts.items():
    normalized_counts[str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")] = value

assert len(normalized_counts) == expected_states

expected_count = shots / expected_states
tolerance = max(1, 0.2 * expected_count)

for i in range(expected_states):
    state = format(i, f"0{num_input_qubits}b")
    assert state in normalized_counts
    assert abs(normalized_counts[state] - expected_count) <= tolerance
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"

observed_total = sum(counts.values())
assert observed_total == shots

normalized_counts = {}
for bitstring, value in counts.items():
    s = str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == num_input_qubits
    normalized_counts[s] = normalized_counts.get(s, 0) + value

assert len(normalized_counts) == expected_states

expected_per_state = shots / expected_states
tolerance = max(1, 0.2 * expected_per_state)

for i in range(expected_states):
    state = format(i, "0{}b".format(num_input_qubits))
    c = normalized_counts.get(state, 0)
    assert abs(c - expected_per_state) <= tolerance, (state, c, expected_per_state)
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits
expected_prob = 1 / expected_states

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total > 0

for i in range(expected_states):
    bitstring = format(i, f"0{num_input_qubits}b")
    observed_prob = counts.get(bitstring, 0) / total
    assert abs(observed_prob - expected_prob) <= 0.1, (bitstring, observed_prob, expected_prob)

assert len(counts) == expected_states
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits
expected_keys = {format(i, "0{}b".format(num_input_qubits)) for i in range(expected_states)}

observed = {str(k): v for k, v in counts.items()}
assert set(observed.keys()) == expected_keys, f"Expected all {expected_states} basis states, got {set(observed.keys())}"

expected_count = shots / expected_states
tolerance = max(1, 0.2 * expected_count)

for bitstring in expected_keys:
    c = observed[bitstring]
    assert abs(c - expected_count) <= tolerance, (
        f"State {bitstring} count {c} not close to uniform expectation {expected_count}"
    )
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits

assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"
assert len(counts) == expected_states

expected_per_state = shots / expected_states
tolerance = max(2, 0.2 * expected_per_state)

total = 0
for state, count in counts.items():
    assert len(state) == num_input_qubits
    assert set(state) <= {"0", "1"}
    assert abs(count - expected_per_state) <= tolerance
    total += count

assert total == shots
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits
expected_keys = {format(i, f"0{num_input_qubits}b") for i in range(expected_states)}

observed_keys = set(counts.keys())
assert observed_keys == expected_keys, f"Expected all {expected_states} basis states, got {observed_keys}"

expected_count = shots / expected_states
tolerance = max(1, 0.2 * expected_count)

total = 0
for state in expected_keys:
    c = counts.get(state, 0)
    total += c
    assert abs(c - expected_count) <= tolerance, (
        f"State {state} count {c} is not close to uniform expectation {expected_count}"
    )

assert total == shots, f"Total counts {total} do not match shots {shots}"
assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"
```

```python
num_input_qubits = metadata.get("num_input_qubits", 3)
expected_states = 2 ** num_input_qubits

assert isinstance(counts, dict)
assert len(counts) == expected_states

expected_per_state = shots / expected_states
tolerance = max(2, 0.2 * expected_per_state)

total = 0
for state, count in counts.items():
    assert len(state) == num_input_qubits
    assert set(state) <= {"0", "1"}
    assert abs(count - expected_per_state) <= tolerance
    total += count

assert total == shots
assert metadata.get("observation_stage") == "after_state_preparation"
```
